title: Clober Dex - Rekt
relevance_summary: Reentrancy attack on Liquidity Vault leading to $500k loss

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls _burn() with a callback that allows multiple withdrawals
prevention.trigger: _burn() with callback -> multiple withdrawals in the same transaction

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls _burn() with a callback that allows multiple withdrawals
summary: Clober Dex suffered a $500k loss due to a reentrancy exploit targeting their unguarded _burn function. A malicious contract abused the burnHook callback to perform multiple withdrawals, draining the vault. A guard could prevent such attacks by blocking any tx that calls _burn() with a callback allowing multiple withdrawals.
